case_title: JOSE LUIS MARTINEZ VS. EMERSON KIM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO NOV-28-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSE LUIS MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EMERSON KIM. PERSONAL SERVICE EFFECTUATED ON DEFENDANT ON OCTOBER 29, 2016, LESS THAN THE FIFTEEN (15) DAYS PRIOR TO TODAY'S HEARING AS REQUIRED BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSE LUIS MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO KIM EMERSON ON 11/29/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO SUCH NUMBER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, EMERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JOSE LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, EMERSON $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
